description:
The libreport-plugin-logger package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove libreport-plugin-logger
rationale:
<tt>libreport-plugin-logger</tt> is a ABRT plugin to report bugs into the
Red Hat Support system.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the libreport-plugin-logger package is installed: 
$ rpm -q libreport-plugin-logger
title: Uninstall libreport-plugin-logger Package
